tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute Python code via subprocess (_run_python, _run_python_file), import and call actual functions (validate_rope, auto_method_docstring, dataclasses.fields), and verify behavioral outcomes (no crashes, correct return values, per-instance isolation). They are not text-matching tests.

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests require substantive changes: test_transformers_version_not_classvar requires the field to appear in dataclasses.fields() which a stub cannot satisfy; test_validate_rope_empty_dict_no_crash requires validate_rope to not crash on empty dict; test_auto_docstring_parameter_filtering requires a new parameter that filters output. None of these can be satisfied by no-op stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All explicitly required behaviors from instruction.md are tested: dataclasses.fields() inclusion (test_transformers_version_not_classvar, test_architectures_not_classvar), per-instance isolation, rope empty dict handling (test_validate_rope_empty_dict_no_crash), rope None regression (test_validate_rope_none_still_works), allowed_params filtering (test_auto_docstring_parameter_filtering, test_auto_docstring_filtering_behavior), config_common_kwargs completeness check.
